# catalystcenter_external_authentication_aaa_attribute (Resource)

Configure the custom AAA attribute used for external user role mapping in Catalyst Center. When not configured, Catalyst Center uses the protocol default (`cisco-av-pair` for TACACS or `Cisco-AVPair` for RADIUS).

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "catalystcenter_external_authentication_aaa_attribute" "example" {
  name = "memberOf"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the custom AAA attribute.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The id of the object

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import catalystcenter_external_authentication_aaa_attribute.example "<name>"
```
